title: Events Radar
content:
# Event Radar — Week of June 1, 2026

**For:** NotVerify / Straker.AI — AI-powered enterprise localization QA
**Prepared:** June 3, 2026 — all events below are UPCOMING relative to today.

> Scope note: GALA WorldReady Berlin (Apr 12–14), KPMG RegTech Frankfurt (Apr 16), RegTech "Mastering AI" London (Mar 26), and BP26 Avignon (Apr 20–22) have already passed and are intentionally excluded.

---

## 🔴 Next 30 Days (June 3 – July 3)

### TAUS Massively Multilingual AI Conference — Rome
- **Dates:** June 3–5, 2026 (HAPPENING NOW — final day June 5)
- **Location:** Rome, Italy
- **Why it matters:** The single most on-target event of the quarter. Theme is "Celebrating European Translation Technology" — MT, **quality estimation, AI orchestration, multilingual content systems**. QE is directly adjacent to NotVerify's localization-QA value prop. The "Brains and Guts of Localization" crowd = ideal customer and partner hunting ground. Watch for MT/QE competitors pitching here.
- **Action:** If anyone from Straker is in-region, this is a walk-the-floor / dinner play. Too late to speak, but prime for partner conversations.
- **Register:** https://www.taus.net/events/massively-multilingual-ai-conference-rome-2026

### LocWorld55 — Dublin
- **Dates:** June 9–11, 2026
- **Location:** Clayton Hotel Burlington Road, Dublin, Ireland
- **Why it matters:** The flagship localization industry gathering since 2003 — strong exhibit hall, enterprise case studies, deep networking. Highest-density buyer pool for localization tooling/QA in the next 30 days. Expect LSPs, enterprise loc teams, and direct competitors (Smartling is a confirmed sponsor/presence) on the floor.
- **Action:** Best near-term **customer hunting + competitor recon** event. Worth attending even without a booth; co-located Localization Institute Global ToolBox runs alongside.
- **Register / Program:** https://locworld.com/events/locworld55-dublin-2026/

### EAMT 2026 — 26th European Association for Machine Translation Conference
- **Dates:** June 15–18, 2026
- **Location:** Tilburg University, Tilburg, Netherlands
- **Why it matters:** Research-focused — neural MT, **evaluation methodology reform, QE, bias mitigation, multilingual LLM adaptation.** The academic-credibility venue for the QA/evaluation science underpinning NotVerify. Good for technical hires, R&D partnerships, and citing/influencing evaluation standards.
- **Action:** Networking + recruiting + thought-leadership signal. Registration is open.
- **Register:** https://eamt2026.org/

---

## 🟡 Next 60 Days (July 4 – Aug 3)

No tier-1 localization, enterprise-AI, SaaS, or RegTech events with confirmed dates in this window surfaced as high-relevance. This is a natural lull (mid-summer). Recommend using it for outbound follow-up from June events and for **submitting speaking/exhibiting proposals** for the fall cluster below (deadlines flagged).

---

## 🟢 Later This Year

### The AI Conference — San Francisco
- **Dates:** Sept 29 – Oct 1, 2026 (Day Zero Sept 29; main days Sept 30 – Oct 1)
- **Location:** Pier 48, Mission Rock, San Francisco, CA
- **Why it matters:** 5,500+ builders/leaders, 120+ speakers, 5 tracks (AGI, LLMs, **agentic AI**, infra, applied AI). Best US stage to position NotVerify's AI/agent story to buyers and investors. Strong speaking/brand play.
- **Register:** https://aiconference.com/

### AGNTCon + MCPCon North America
- **Dates:** Oct 22–23, 2026
- **Location:** San Jose, CA
- **Why it matters:** Flagship open agentic-AI / **MCP** ecosystem event (Agentic AI Foundation, under Linux Foundation). Directly relevant if NotVerify ships an MCP server or agentic QA workflows. Developer + enterprise-adopter audience.
- **Register:** https://www.crossmint.com/learn/ai-agent-conference-calendar (calendar listing)

### Augmented Enterprise Summit — Enterprise AI
- **Dates:** Oct 13–15, 2026
- **Location:** Atlanta, GA
- **Why it matters:** Enterprise AI + XR + digital twins, built on **end-user case studies.** Enterprise-buyer heavy — useful for the "enterprise QA at scale" narrative.
- **Register:** https://augmentedenterprisesummit.com/

### LocWorld56 — Vancouver
- **Dates:** Oct 19–21, 2026
- **Location:** Vancouver, BC, Canada
- **Why it matters:** North American edition of the flagship loc event. Second major customer-hunting / competitor-presence window of the year, in a friendlier timezone for NA enterprise buyers.
- **Register:** https://locworld.com/events/locworld56-vancouver-2026/

### Global RegTech Summit — London
- **Dates:** Nov (33rd RegTech Convention: Nov 23–26) / see also fintech.global summit cycle
- **Location:** London, UK
- **Why it matters:** RegTech / compliance buyers care about **auditable, verifiable language controls** — adjacent to NotVerify's "verify" positioning for regulated content (finance, pharma, legal). Exploratory adjacency, not core loc.
- **Register:** https://www.regtech-convention.com/en/ and https://fintech.global/globalregtechsummit/

---

## ⏰ Submission Deadlines to Watch (act soon)

- **The AI Conference (Sept 29 – Oct 1):** Speaker slots and early-bird/team pricing close as fall approaches — submit speaking interest and lock team tickets in **June/July**.
- **AGNTCon + MCPCon (Oct 22–23):** Open agentic/MCP CFP windows close over summer — submit a talk on agentic localization QA in **July**.
- **LocWorld56 Vancouver (Oct 19–21):** Call for Papers and exhibitor booths fill months ahead — confirm exhibit/speaking by **July–Aug**.
- **Augmented Enterprise Summit (Oct 13–15):** Case-study speaking slots are competitive — pitch the enterprise QA case study **early summer**.

*(Exact CFP dates were not individually confirmed on each organizer page; verify directly before relying on them.)*

---

### Recommended priorities
1. **LocWorld55 Dublin (Jun 9–11)** — go now; highest buyer + competitor density this month.
2. **TAUS Rome (through Jun 5)** — catch the tail if anyone is in-region.
3. **The AI Conference SF (Sep)** — secure a speaking slot for the AI-platform narrative.
4. **LocWorld56 Vancouver (Oct)** — book an NA exhibit/speaking presence.
